description: Import facility data for 'Praxair Distribution Inc.' (FAC-00147) from 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\praxair_import.xml' and update Confidential Business Information (CBI) claims. For 'Proprietary Cooling Blend X-40' (CAS 68476-85-7), claim the chemical identity as a Trade Secret with 'Refrigerant Gas Blend' as the generic class name. For 'Anhydrous Ammonia' (CAS 7664-41-7), claim the storage location as Confidential while ensuring it is not marked as a Trade Secret. Verify that 'Sulfuric Acid' has no CBI claims set. Export the modified facility data to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\praxair_cbi_export.xml'.
